**🔥 NEW Butter Chicken Bowl DROP! 🔥**

Tender chicken *drizzled* in that *buttery* sauce, fluffy rice, and all the *spice* vibes. This bowl is *chef’s kiss* 🤌🏾—so good, it’s basically a *flavor mood*.

**💸 10% OFF** with code **BUTTERBOWL10** (but like, don’t ghost this deal—it’s limited!).

*(P.S. Your future self will be *so* grateful.)*

*(Gen Z-approved: relatable, punchy, and packed with *vibes*.)*
